scenarios.name: Test a login form with validation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses userEvent.setup() with user.type/user.click, queries by getByRole("button", {name}) and getByLabelText, and asserts validation via getByRole("alert"); baseline tends to fall back to fireEvent and CSS/testId selectors that the skill explicitly discourages.

scenarios.name: Test async user profile fetch with loading and error states
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps async assertions in waitFor, queries by getByRole("heading") and getByRole("alert"), and asserts the initial loading text; baseline often uses class-based selectors and ad-hoc timers instead of waitFor.
